memory:memory/2026-05-11.md:690:708.snippet: ## Late Session â€” Exit Target Bug & Consolidation Gate Fix (2026-05-11 ~20:00 MT) ### Critical Bug: Exit / Stop Targets Anchored to EMA (not Entry Price) **Problem**: `exit_p` and `stop_p` were calculated relative to EMA12/EMA50: - `exit_p = e12 * (1 + trigger / 100.0)` â€” exits at trigger % above EMA12 - `stop_p = e50 * (1 - STOP_LOSS_PCT / 100.0)` â€” stops at stop-loss % below EMA50 When price rises, EMA12 chases it up. So exit target also rises â€” perpetually ~0.15% above current price. Bot never reaches the target because the target moves with price. Same for stop loss: as price pulls back, EMA50 drops lower, making the stop loss even further below current price. Both targets float away i
